immediate_actions: Update all app subscriptions to weekly + trial (App Store Connect)
ASO sweep: keyword in title, territory localization for UK+AUS
Post Reddit content batch (r/SaaS, r/Entrepreneur, r/microsaas)

post_candidates.hook: adapty just dropped their 2026 subscription report. weekly plans now = 55% of all app revenue.
post_candidates.body: weekly + trial has the strongest 12-month ltv of any subscription config. weekly converts 6x better on ios than android. if your app uses monthly-only you're leaving serious money on the table.
post_candidates.cta: changed all our apps to weekly + trial this week. sharing results in 30 days.

post_candidates.hook: ios app crossed $100 in 6 weeks with one aso trick
post_candidates.body: moved the primary keyword into the title. stopped repeating title words in the 100-char keyword field (apple already indexes those — you're wasting space). added uk + australian english metadata in app store connect. zero dev work, separate ranking opportunities per territory.
post_candidates.cta: free: use apple search ads keyword tool to find long-tail keywords before you pick your title.
